message:
feat(fsqlite-core): integrate repair_symbols module with xxhash-rust dep (bd-1hi.22)

Register repair_symbols.rs (§3.5.3 Deterministic Repair Symbol Generation)
in fsqlite-core and add the xxhash-rust workspace dependency it requires.
Minor cargo fmt touchups.
